records.title: ICU Stays per Scenario
records.description: Bar chart of ICU stay counts across all 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios, sorted descending.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Heart Rate
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Heart Rate for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Systolic Blood Pressure
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Systolic Blood Pressure for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Diastolic Blood Pressure
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Diastolic Blood Pressure for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Mean Blood Pressure
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Mean Blood Pressure for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Temperature
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Temperature for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Respiratory Rate
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Respiratory Rate for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Vital Mean ± Std with Median across Scenarios — Oxygen Saturation
records.description: Error-bar plot of mean ± 1 std dev and median of Oxygen Saturation for each of the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Z-Scored Variable Means Heatmap across Scenarios
records.description: Row-normalised (z-score) heatmap of mean values for all 7 vitals across the 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: Lens Plot — Heart Rate (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of Heart Rate values across 5 aggregation methods (rows) and 24 hours (columns) for the baseline cohort.

records.title: Lens Plot — Systolic Blood Pressure (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of Systolic Blood Pressure values across 5 aggregation methods (rows) and 24 hours (columns) for the baseline cohort.

records.title: Lens Plot — Diastolic Blood Pressure (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of Diastolic Blood Pressure values across 5 aggregation methods (rows) and 24 hours (columns) for the baseline cohort.

records.title: Lens Plot — Mean Blood Pressure (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)

records.title: Lens Plot — Respiratory Rate (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of Respiratory Rate values across 5 aggregation methods (rows) and 24 hours (columns) for the baseline cohort.

records.title: Lens Plot — Temperature (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)

records.title: Lens Plot — Oxygen Saturation (Aggregation × Hour Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of Oxygen Saturation values across 5 aggregation methods (rows) and 24 hours (columns) for the baseline cohort.

records.title: Centroid Shift PCA — Mean Aggregation

records.title: Positive-Class Prevalence by Scenario
records.description: Grouped bar chart of ICU-LOS and hospital mortality positive-class prevalence for baseline and all 12 variant scenarios.

records.title: Distribution of Record Lengths across Scenarios (KDE)

records.label: mortality
records.title: Pipeline Performance by Aggregation Method — Grouped Bar
records.description: Grouped bar chart (Accuracy, F1, AUC-ROC) comparing MIMIC_Extract vs EHR-Dataset-Processing for each of the 5 aggregation methods.

records.label: mortality
records.title: Pipeline Score Deviation Heatmap (EHR − MIMIC)
records.description: Annotated heatmap showing EHR minus MIMIC percentage-point difference across metrics (rows) and aggregation methods (columns).

records.label: mortality
records.title: McNemar Significance — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (by Aggregation)
records.description: McNemar significance bars for paired MIMIC_Extract vs EHR predictions, broken down by aggregation method.

records.title: Per-Vital Centroid Shift — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (Mean Aggregation)
records.description: Bar chart of relative centroid shift per vital (7 vitals) comparing MIMIC_Extract and EHR-Dataset-Processing with 'mean' aggregation.

records.title: Per-Vital Centroid Shift — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (Median Aggregation)
records.description: Bar chart of relative centroid shift per vital (7 vitals) comparing MIMIC_Extract and EHR-Dataset-Processing with 'median' aggregation.

records.title: Per-Vital Centroid Shift — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (Standard Deviation Aggregation)
records.description: Bar chart of relative centroid shift per vital (7 vitals) comparing MIMIC_Extract and EHR-Dataset-Processing with 'standard deviation' aggregation.

records.title: Per-Vital Centroid Shift — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (Mean Deviation Aggregation)
records.description: Bar chart of relative centroid shift per vital (7 vitals) comparing MIMIC_Extract and EHR-Dataset-Processing with 'mean deviation' aggregation.

records.title: Per-Vital Centroid Shift — MIMIC_Extract vs EHR (Maximum Deviation Aggregation)
records.description: Bar chart of relative centroid shift per vital (7 vitals) comparing MIMIC_Extract and EHR-Dataset-Processing with 'maximum deviation' aggregation.

records.title: MIMIC_Extract Vital Means by Scenario (Heatmap)
records.description: Annotated heatmap of z-scored vital means across all 13 MIMIC_Extract cohort scenarios.

records.title: MIMIC_Extract Accuracy Δ vs Baseline by Scenario (Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of test accuracy change vs baseline_nofilters, for each aggregation method × scenario combination.

records.title: MIMIC_Extract McNemar −log₁₀(p) by Scenario (Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of −log₁₀(McNemar p-value) vs baseline_nofilters for each aggregation method × scenario combination.

records.title: EHR Filter-Step Progression — Accuracy and AUC (Line Chart)
records.description: Line chart of test accuracy and AUC-ROC across all 13 EHR filter-pipeline steps, one line per aggregation method.

records.title: EHR AUC-ROC by Filter Step and Aggregation (Heatmap)
records.description: Heatmap of AUC-ROC values for each aggregation method × filter step in the EHR-Dataset-Processing pipeline.

records.title: Cross-Pipeline Deviation Bars — Mean Aggregation
records.description: Side-by-side diverging bar chart: MIMIC_Extract scenario Δ accuracy (left) and EHR filter-step Δ accuracy (right) relative to each pipeline's baseline, using 'mean' aggregation.

records.title: Cross-Pipeline Deviation Bars — Median Aggregation
records.description: Side-by-side diverging bar chart: MIMIC_Extract scenario Δ accuracy (left) and EHR filter-step Δ accuracy (right) relative to each pipeline's baseline, using 'median' aggregation.

records.title: Cross-Pipeline Deviation Bars — Standard Deviation Aggregation
records.description: Side-by-side diverging bar chart: MIMIC_Extract scenario Δ accuracy (left) and EHR filter-step Δ accuracy (right) relative to each pipeline's baseline, using 'standard deviation' aggregation.

records.title: Cross-Pipeline Deviation Bars — Mean Deviation Aggregation
records.description: Side-by-side diverging bar chart: MIMIC_Extract scenario Δ accuracy (left) and EHR filter-step Δ accuracy (right) relative to each pipeline's baseline, using 'mean deviation' aggregation.

records.title: Cross-Pipeline Deviation Bars — Maximum Deviation Aggregation
records.description: Side-by-side diverging bar chart: MIMIC_Extract scenario Δ accuracy (left) and EHR filter-step Δ accuracy (right) relative to each pipeline's baseline, using 'maximum deviation' aggregation.

records.title: Summary Dashboard — Accuracy and F1 by Aggregation Method
records.description: Grouped bar chart of mean accuracy and F1 (with error bars) for MIMIC_Extract vs EHR-Dataset-Processing across all 5 aggregation methods.
